scope: Visible provider lifecycle/status badges on live detail, chart, Book/orderbook, and ticket handoff

assertions.liveRefreshDue: Live detail exposes provider-lifecycle-refresh-due with visible Live refresh due text when backend liveDataStatus is absent.
assertions.chartReady: Chart context exposes provider-lifecycle-ready with visible Chart provider ready text from deterministic embedded history.
assertions.bookRefreshing: Opening Book produces a visible provider-lifecycle-refreshing Book depth refreshing state before the resolved depth state.
assertions.bookNotReady: Book availability and Book ticket handoff expose provider-lifecycle-not-ready rather than silently becoming provider-ready.
assertions.fallbackGuard: Ticket handoff avoids mock-ready/default-ready and Mexico moneyline fallback markers.

remainingGaps: Live mock status is deterministic backend-contract-shaped fixture UI because backend liveDataStatus is absent in this branch.
Real provider status freshness remains dependent on backend/provider contract fields.
